calendar_gate.rationale: v7.9 promotion-decision date locked by infra-master-plan-2026-05-12 §4.1. 7-day Mechanism A coverage calibration window opened 2026-05-15 (v7.8.6 ship) and freezes 2026-05-21. No new gate-coverage telemetry candidates should land 2026-05-15→05-21 to keep the baseline clean.

primary_metric: Number of advisory gates successfully promoted to enforced with 0 false positives in the 7-day post-flip soak
success_metrics: All 4 v7.8.1 advisory gates (BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B, BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode C, FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS, ISOLATION_OPT_OUT_REASON_MISSING already enforced) reviewed for promotion readiness
Mechanism A gate-coverage.jsonl shows non-zero candidate count for each gate proposed for promotion
Zero false-positive findings in the 2026-05-15 → 05-21 calibration window
Post-promotion T+7d baseline (2026-05-28) shows zero regressions vs 2026-05-14 pre-promotion anchor
kill_criteria: Mechanism A telemetry shows 0% coverage for any advisory-being-promoted gate at decision time (cannot promote what was never calibrated)
False positive rate >5% during calibration window for any proposed-promotion gate
Post-promotion bug surfaces requiring rollback within T+7d soak — defer promotion or restore advisory mode
scope_summary: Single-flag flip at scripts/check-state-schema.py:132 (BRANCH_ISOLATION_ADVISORY_MODE = True → False) promotes 3 v7.8.1 advisory gates simultaneously: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B (infra commit-level), BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode C (per-state.json mutation), and FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS (write-time). All 4 §2.2 promotion criteria verified GREEN against 14d Mechanism A telemetry (18+13+13 rows, 0 zero-candidate, 0 false positives). Side-effects: CLAUDE.md v7.9 section + dev-guide §2.4.1 + cold-start entrypoint + FT2-FH-003 honesty ledger entry + framework-v7-9-promotion-case-study.md + Linear epic FIT-72. Reversibility: single-line revert <5 min. Phase E validation 2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04 (B2 baseline snapshot 2026-05-28).

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md: header version chain v7.9 + advisory-mode language + new v7.9 Promotion Release section
Add FT2-FH-003 entry to docs/case-studies/framework-honesty-ledger.md (calibration discipline pattern codification)
Author docs/case-studies/framework-v7-9-promotion-case-study.md (live append-only journal; §99 deferred to 2026-05-28 post-B2)
Open Linear epic FIT-72 v7.9-promotion + per-gate sub-issues

research.decision: PROMOTE all 3 candidate gates (BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B + Mode C + FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS) via single-flag flip at scripts/check-state-schema.py:132
research.decision_rationale: B1 freeze checklist GREEN: integrity-check 0 findings, integrity-diff 3 dilution Δ only (4 new post-v6 features, denominator grew 70→74, numerator flat — not real drift), doc-debt baseline-aligned, measurement-adoption stable at 3/40 fully-adopted, membrane-status normal. 14d Mechanism A telemetry: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B 18 rows, Mode C 13 rows, FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS 13 rows. 0 zero-candidate rows across all 3 gates. All skip_reasons map to documented legitimate cases (not_infra_commit_level, not_complete_transition, opt_out_false_or_absent, no_phase_change). 0 false-positive firings in 14d window (operator review of 44 firing rows). All 4 §2.2 criteria met for each candidate. ISOLATION_OPT_OUT_REASON_MISSING already enforced at v7.8.1. Mechanism A coverage gates + Mechanism C session-attribution + CACHE_HITS_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_DRIFT + Mechanism E merge driver already enforced at v7.8/v7.8.3. No further candidates for this promotion window.
research.note: Calibration data collection phase (2026-04-25 → 2026-05-21). Operator-driven freeze-day checklist + per-gate decision recording.

prd.reason: Spec pre-exists at docs/master-plan/infra-master-plan-2026-05-12.md §2.1 (advisory→enforced calendar) + §2.2 (4-criterion decision criteria) + §2.3 (side-effects list) + §3.6.2 (Phase E validation calendar). No new PRD needed for a single-flag enforcement flip whose criteria + side-effects + post-promotion calendar were defined 9 days in advance.

tasks_phase.reason: Tasks pre-defined in docs/master-plan/post-v7-9-candidate-plan-2026-05-20.md §1 (C-1 through C-7). Drafted 2026-05-20 eve as the operator's per-action checklist for freeze day. Captured as tasks[] in this state.json.

implement.note: Executing C-1 through C-5 + C-7 in single PR. C-6 (Linear epic) opens after PR is up.

learn.note: Phase E validation soak 2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04. B2 baseline snapshot lands 2026-05-28 (must-have-cadence-followups.md §B2). v7.9 case study §99 + kill_criteria_resolution filled in at B2.

_meta.scaffold_origin: System sweep audit 2026-05-16 surfaced gap: v7.9 promotion-decision (2026-05-21) is the highest-stakes upcoming framework event but had no state.json tracking container. Precedent: framework-v7-8-branch-isolation. This scaffold creates the container so the promotion decision has a discoverable home.
